hyperedges.label: Art Reference to Runtime Production Pipeline

nodes.label: Runtime Reference Exclusion
nodes.rationale: Reference files are retained for visual development but intentionally not loaded by the current runtime.

nodes.label: Art Asset Manifest and Curation Plan
nodes.norm_label: art asset manifest and curation plan

nodes.label: Reference and Runtime Art Separation
nodes.rationale: High-resolution supplied images guide visual development and may support optimized menus or cinematics, but are not silently mixed into the 480x270 procedural pixel world.

nodes.label: Production Style Lock
nodes.rationale: The art direction preserves readable silhouettes, a warm painterly pixel style, a restrained textile-led palette, and dignified working-class environments without grime caricature.

nodes.label: Art Curation Checklist
nodes.rationale: Generated and converted art must retain readable silhouettes, historical consistency, walkable composition, correct anatomy, and manual pixel cleanup.

nodes.label: Optimized Runtime Asset Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Every runtime bitmap requires an optimized WebP or PNG plus provenance, while reference assets should remain outside runtime preload and release downloads where practical.

nodes.label: The Gilded Needle Product and Game Design Plan
nodes.norm_label: the gilded needle product and game design plan

nodes.label: Dignity Craft Family and Gradual Stability
nodes.rationale: The game is designed around dignity, craft, family, gradual stability, and readable decisions.
nodes.norm_label: dignity craft family and gradual stability

nodes.label: Production Canon
nodes.rationale: The family and shop-management premise overrides the older inheritance and train premise while retaining compatible locations, characters, systems, and progression.

nodes.label: Twenty to Thirty Minute Player Promise
nodes.rationale: Each session should deliver one meaningful garment, one customer-story resolution, and one visible improvement to stability, home, skill, or community standing.
nodes.norm_label: twenty to thirty minute player promise

nodes.label: Order Intake and Fulfillment System
nodes.rationale: Deposits prevent catastrophic material loss, while signed intake choices and dialogue preserve player agency around negotiation and underpayment.

nodes.label: Customer Behavior Archetypes
nodes.rationale: Archetypes guide patience, budget, expectations, mess, reliability, and relationships without mapping wealth to kindness.

nodes.label: Cleanliness System
nodes.rationale: Cleanliness affects service and customer patience but is explicitly framed as a service condition rather than a judgment about class or human worth.

nodes.label: Capacity and Stress System
nodes.rationale: Stress changes sewing difficulty predictably and triggers safe closure at its maximum rather than random failure or punitive collapse.

nodes.label: Household and Home Progression
nodes.rationale: Home upgrades represent safety, rest, privacy, and belonging; they are not presented as fixing poverty.

nodes.label: Elise Health System
nodes.rationale: Elise's health creates telegraphed capacity constraints with reasonable responses, while illness never functions as punishment or a guaranteed-cure problem.

nodes.label: Fair-Wage Hiring System
nodes.rationale: Hiring unlocks only after recurring revenue and basic home stability; staff have fixed wages, schedules, strengths, and arcs with no unpaid-labor system.

nodes.label: Success Metrics and Narrative Guardrails
nodes.rationale: The design requires readable obligations, multiple viable plans, recoverable failure, visible home progress, telegraphed illness, and no equation of wealth with virtue or cleanliness with worth.

nodes.label: Image-Backed Scene Architecture
nodes.rationale: Painted scenes serve as full-screen backgrounds while characters, hotspots, customers, mini-games, and UI are layered on top without a tile engine.

nodes.label: Layered Build Strategy
nodes.rationale: Issues are ordered so P0 blocks the vertical slice, P1 completes it, and P2 expands the full game.
